mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM skill WHERE status = 'published'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM install_record WHERE installed_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rating WHERE updated_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(installed_at, '%Y-%m') AS bucket
DATE_FORMAT(installed_at, '%x-W%v') AS bucket
DATE_FORMAT(installed_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS bucket
, COUNT(1) AS installs FROM install_record WHERE installed_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket ASC

SELECT s.id AS skillId, s.name AS skillName, COUNT(ir.id) AS installCount FROM install_record ir INNER JOIN skill s ON s.id = ir.skill_id WHERE ir.installed_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY installCount DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT s.author_id AS authorId, COALESCE(u.username, CONCAT('user-', s.author_id)) AS username, COUNT(1) AS publishedCount FROM skill s LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = s.author_id WHERE s.status = 'published' AND s.updated_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY s.author_id, username ORDER BY publishedCount DESC, s.author_id DESC LIMIT 5
